settings.content_1:
• Professional-grade shoe cleaning kit designed for sneaker enthusiasts
  • Complete solution for maintaining and restoring your favorite footwear
  • Includes premium cleaning brush, microfiber cloth, and specialized cleaning solution
  • Safe for all shoe materials including leather, suede, canvas, and mesh
  • Eco-friendly formula that effectively removes dirt, stains, and scuff marks
  • Compact and portable design perfect for home use or travel
  • Trusted by sneakerheads and professional shoe cleaners worldwide
settings.content_2:
• Kit includes: 100ml cleaning solution, premium bristle brush, microfiber towel
  • Cleaning solution: pH-balanced, biodegradable formula
  • Brush dimensions: 15cm length with soft and medium bristle options
  • Microfiber cloth: 30cm x 30cm, ultra-absorbent material
  • Solution bottle: Leak-proof cap with precision applicator
  • Total kit weight: 250 grams
  • Packaging: Recyclable cardboard box with protective foam insert
  • Shelf life: 24 months from manufacture date
  • Made with premium materials for long-lasting performance
settings.content_3:
• Cleaning solution: Water-based, non-toxic, biodegradable ingredients
  • Brush: Natural and synthetic bristles with ergonomic wooden handle
  • Microfiber cloth: 80% polyester, 20% polyamide blend
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
  • Keep cleaning solution tightly sealed when not in use
  • Rinse brush thoroughly after each use and air dry
  • Wash microfiber cloth separately in cold water, air dry only
  • Do not expose to extreme temperatures or freezing conditions
  • Keep out of reach of children and pets
settings.content_4:
• Free standard shipping on all orders across India
  • Express delivery available for major cities (1-2 business days)
  • Standard delivery: 3-5 business days to most locations
  • Order tracking provided via email and SMS
  • 30-day hassle-free return policy on unopened products
  • Full refund if product is defective or damaged during shipping
  • Return shipping costs covered for defective items
  • Refunds processed within 5-7 business days after return approval
  • Contact customer support for any shipping or return queries

settings.heading: Long-Lasting Results
settings.text: Professional-grade formula provides durable protection that lasts through multiple wears and washes.

settings.heading: Color Restoration
settings.text: Revitalizes faded colors and restores original vibrancy to keep your sneakers looking brand new.

settings.heading: Premium Protection
settings.text: Advanced formula creates an invisible protective barrier that repels water, stains, and UV damage.

settings.review_1_text: Absolutely love this product! The quality exceeded my expectations and the customer service was outstanding. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a reliable solution.
settings.review_2_text: Best purchase I've made this year! Fast shipping, great packaging, and the product works exactly as described. Will definitely be ordering again.
settings.review_3_text: I was skeptical at first, but this completely changed my mind. The attention to detail is impressive and it's clear they care about their customers. Five stars!
